body:
## Summary
- add explicit web `aria-hidden` output to CelebrationBurst decorative branches
- extend the CelebrationBurst validator to cover the reduced-motion hook/static hidden branch
- add a Playwright reduced-motion proof for Practice and routed quiz celebration cues

## Validation
- `./node_modules/.bin/prettier --check components/quiz/CelebrationBurst.tsx tests/e2e/celebration-burst-feedback.spec.ts scripts/validate-content.js`
- `git diff --check`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-celebration-burst-accessibility-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern 'CelebrationBurst|reduced-motion'`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 E2E_PORT=4190 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/celebration-burst-feedback.spec.ts --workers=1`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:theme-discipline`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:a11y-labels`

## Notes
A broader `npm run test:content -- --test-concurrency=1` run currently reports unrelated failures already present on `main`, so this PR is validated with the focused content, typecheck, build, E2E, theme, and a11y suites above.
title: uiux: prove reduced-motion celebration cue behavior
